articles.title: Feds Sniffing Around Polymarket After Suspicious Bets
articles.summary: Federal investigators are examining unusual betting patterns on Polymarket that suggest possible market manipulation or insider trading. This probe could trigger the first major regulatory crackdown on prediction markets, potentially reshaping how these platforms operate in the US.

articles.title: Democrats urge warnings to federal officials against insider bets on prediction markets
articles.summary: Democrats want federal officials to get explicit warnings about using their inside information to place bets on prediction markets. This signals growing concern that government insiders could manipulate or unfairly profit from political betting markets, which could trigger stricter oversight or access restrictions for everyone.

articles.title: Madden 27 Cover Athlete: Kalshi Predictions
articles.summary: Kalshi traders are betting on which NFL star will grace the cover of Madden 27, the latest installment of EA's flagship football video game. The market taps into both NFL fandom and gaming culture, offering sharp bettors a chance to profit from celebrity endorsement decisions that typically favor breakout stars and MVP candidates.

articles.title: At least three more Air Force members questioned on Iran war Polymarket betting
articles.summary: The Air Force is investigating at least three more service members for betting on Iran war markets on Polymarket, expanding beyond earlier cases. Military personnel having inside information on conflict decisions creates serious market integrity issues that could prompt regulators to restrict defense-related betting markets.

articles.title: Kalshi is aggressively advertising on TikTok, seemingly targeting young people while promising a “money hack”
articles.summary: Kalshi is flooding TikTok with ads pitching prediction markets as a "money hack" to young users who probably can't tell the difference between betting and investing. The aggressive youth-focused marketing signals Kalshi thinks Gen Z will drive the next wave of prediction market adoption, but it also risks attracting regulatory scrutiny over gambling-adjacent advertising to minors.

articles.title: Polymarket trader exploits UFC blunder, turns $676 into $67,000 in under a minute
articles.summary: A Polymarket trader capitalized on the UFC's accidental early announcement of fight results, parlaying $676 into $67,000 before the market could correct itself. The incident highlights how information asymmetries can create massive arbitrage opportunities in prediction markets, though it also raises questions about whether such wins constitute legitimate trading or exploitation of technical errors.

articles.title: Duke vs UConn Predictions: Kalshi Odds and Markets
articles.summary: Duke and UConn are facing off in what appears to be a high-stakes matchup, with Kalshi offering prediction markets on the outcome alongside traditional betting odds. This game likely represents a major test case for how prediction markets price college basketball compared to sportsbooks, especially given both teams' championship pedigree and national following.

articles.title: Pints meet prop bets: Polymarket’s “Situation Room” pop-up bar in DC
articles.summary: Polymarket launched a pop-up bar in DC called "Situation Room" where people can drink and place prop bets in person. The move signals prediction markets are pushing beyond crypto bros into mainstream social spaces, potentially normalizing political betting for casual punters who wouldn't otherwise download an app.
